caption: A promotional graphic for TFNN.COM, "EDUCATING INVESTORS," features a green-themed design on the left and a white background on the right. The green section displays a book cover titled "Fibonacci 24/7" by Larry Pesavento, positioned above a banner that repeats "FIBONACCI 24/7" in yellow text. Below this banner, the name "Basil Chapman" appears in white, followed by a smaller line stating "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022." On the white section of the graphic, red text asks, "NOT SATISFIED?" Across the sequence, a phrase gradually appears below the question. Initially, only "GET A" is visible. In the following frames, the text updates to "GET A FULL REFUND WITHIN 30 DAYS." The layout and background elements remain static while only the refund guarantee text is added and completed.
